responses:
theorem P2_implies_P3 {X : Type*} [TopologicalSpace X] {A : Set X} :
    Topology.P2 A → Topology.P3 A :=
by
  intro hP2
  have hsubset : interior (closure (interior A)) ⊆ interior (closure A) := by
    apply interior_mono
    apply closure_mono
    exact interior_subset
  exact subset_trans hP2 hsubset
